No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly aims to '為日後就業...建立基礎' (build a foundation for future employment) by providing '初階滲透測試的能力' (basic penetration testing skills), directly aligning with Target 4.4 on relevant skills for employment.
evidence: 具備初階滲透測試的能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for '日後就業' (future employment) in cybersecurity, a high-tech field, contributing to 'decent work' (Target 8.5) and 'technological upgrading and innovation' (Target 8.2).
evidence: 資訊科技相關問題分析、解決與決策能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on '完善資安防禦' (improving information security defense) directly supports 'resilient infrastructure' (Target 9.1) and enhances 'technological capabilities' (Target 9.5) for industry and ICT (Target 9.c).
evidence: 提昇學生對網路、作業系統及資訊安全三方面的認知

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Cybersecurity skills, particularly in defending against '阻斷服務攻擊' (Denial-of-Service attacks), contribute to the resilience of urban digital infrastructure, aligning with Target 11.b on disaster resilience.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly addresses combating '駭客攻擊' (hacker attacks) and '惡意程式攻擊' (malware attacks), which are forms of cybercrime (Target 16.4), and strengthens institutional capacity for defense (Target 16.a).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Securing 'information and communications technology' (ICT) is foundational for its effective use in capacity-building and achieving other development goals, aligning with Target 17.8.
